title: Verify public LEDGER composition contract
preconditions: Version-compatible and incompatible public LEDGER category and snapshot actuals seams can return multi-page, expired, corrected, refund, transfer, lifecycle, and failure cases.
steps: Invoke the relevant Public Budget Operations and exercise every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-LEDGER-COMPOSITION, including its validation, lifecycle, compatibility, authority, replay, and unavailable paths where applicable.
expected: Every acceptance criterion of FR-BUDGET-LEDGER-COMPOSITION holds; all documented errors are stable; every rejected or failed mutation leaves the required prior state unchanged; no prohibited side effect occurs.
